heroTitle: Specialists in Connecting Brands with Influencers
heroDesc: to execute impactful digital marketing campaigns.
campaignDesc: We transform brand ideas into creative content delivered by influencers that reaches the right audience.
campaignTitle: From a simple idea… to a campaign that makes an impact
resultsDesc: Because success isn’t measured by engagement alone, but by results. Here, we share stories of collaborations built professionally, managed transparently, and that achieved their goals.

aboutPlatform.cardDesc: We are a specialized tech platform that connects companies with influencers in a professional way. We simplify agreement steps, campaign management, performance tracking, and long-term relationship building. We believe successful collaboration starts with clear organization, effective communication, and lasting trust.

Influencers.title: Our Most Popular Influencers
Influencers.desc: We are a specialized tech platform that connects companies with influencers in a professional and structured way.

campaignShowcase.desc: Examples of successful collaborations between brands and influencers on our platform

overview.title: Overview
overview.sideCard: Explore audience size across all social media platforms

topInfluencers2.title: Our Most Popular Influencers
topInfluencers2.desc: We are a specialized tech platform that connects companies with influencers in a professional way.

1.title: Smart matching between brands and influencers
1.desc: We connect each campaign with the most suitable influencer based on niche and expertise to ensure the best results for both sides.

2.title: Clear and organized management
2.desc: From agreement to execution and payment, every step is handled in one transparent and structured workflow.

3.title: Secure payment and protection system
3.desc: Funds are held until services are completed, then released securely while protecting the rights of all parties.

4.title: Performance-driven results and experience
4.desc: Each campaign is evaluated based on real performance to improve collaboration quality and increase future success.

trustedCompanies.desc: A group of brands that partnered with us to launch successful influencer marketing campaigns.

sara.preview: I reviewed the brief and I can send the first storyboard this afternoon.
sara.message1: I reviewed the brief and the visual direction feels clear. I can send the first storyboard this afternoon.
sara.message2: Perfect. We want the opening frames to focus on texture and before/after product usage.
sara.message3: Great, I will keep the first cut soft and premium, then send both Reel and Story versions for approval.

lina.preview: The product arrived, and I can start shooting tomorrow morning.
lina.message1: The product arrived on time. Are you comfortable with a short three-scene Reel plus two supporting Stories?
lina.message2: Yes, that works for me. I can start shooting tomorrow morning and share the first frames before noon.

noor.preview: Please confirm the guest list details before I finalize the event coverage plan.
noor.message1: Please confirm the guest list details before I finalize the event coverage plan and assign a second camera angle.

growth.preview: We loved the draft hook. Can you deliver the final cut by tomorrow afternoon?
growth.message1: We loved the first draft hook. Can you deliver the final cut by tomorrow afternoon so we can schedule the post?
growth.message2: Yes, I can deliver tomorrow before 3 PM. I will also send a clean caption option with the final cut.
growth.message3: Perfect. Once we review the final edit, we will send publishing approval directly in this thread.

lumina.preview: Your revised offer looks good. We only need to align on the number of supporting Stories.
lumina.message1: I updated the offer with one Reel, two Stories, and raw clips for paid usage over 30 days.
lumina.message2: Your revised offer looks good. We only need to align on the number of supporting Stories before we confirm.

olive.preview: Thanks again, the campaign closed successfully and payout is now scheduled.
olive.message1: Thanks again, the campaign closed successfully and payout is now scheduled for the next transfer cycle.

camPopup.defaultTerms: The collaboration may not be canceled for 14 days once the agreement is sent.

whoUs.title: We connect brands with influencers to create real impact

paragraphs.1: We are a Saudi platform specialized in connecting brands with content creators in a professional and organized way. We help brands turn campaign ideas into meaningful collaborations based on clear data, transparent communication, and a trusted workflow that supports better decisions from the start.
paragraphs.2: Our role starts from making influencer discovery easier, then continues by simplifying communication, alignment, and campaign management in one place. This allows companies to focus on outcomes while creators receive a smoother experience built on clarity and mutual trust.
paragraphs.3: We believe strong campaigns happen when the right creator, the right message, and the right audience meet at the right time. That is why we built a complete environment that brings every step together and helps both sides achieve better, more measurable results.

whoUs.footerText: A platform that connects companies with influencers through organized, transparent collaborations built on real results.
whoUs.footerButton: Enter your email to receive every update
